fields.summary: Create an agent-less docker provider in the native-services framework
[Umbrella] Native YARN framework layer for services and beyond

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: The Slider AM has a pluggable portion called a provider. Currently the only provider implementation is the agent provider which contains the bulk of the agent-related Java code. We can implement a docker provider that does not use the agent and gets information it needs directly from the NM.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: Create an agent-less docker-less provider in the native services framework

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved
